title: Lifesteal (LSN) Custom Enchants Resource Pack
description:
Lifesteal.Net Public Custom Enchants Pack
You Can Clearly And Smoothly See Others Custom Enchants Either On Their Armor, Tools Or Weapons.
body:
# **Lifesteal.Net Public Custom Enchants Pack**
With This Pack You Can Clearly And Smoothly See Others Custom Enchants Either On Their Armor, Tools Or Weapons. It adds Textures For Custom Enchants for you to be able to separate them from normal Tools, Weapons Or Armor.
It Looks Very Smooth In Clips If You Use Custom Enchants On Lifesteal.net(LSN). 
Download This Pack So You Can See Differnce Between Custom Enchants And Regular Tools, Weapons Or Armor.
![Custom Enchants On Armor And An Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c94c1b0716572c169376521646225e1c60834a0f.jpeg)
## For below 1.21.1:
To Use It You Either Need Optifine Or [Cit-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn). 
## For higher versions than 1.21.1:
[Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)
### This Is A Public Pack And Free To Usage.

Copyright Ownership: All textures, designs, and assets in this pack are the exclusive property of the creator.

Non-Commercial Use Only: You may use this texture pack for personal use, recording clips, or streaming content on Lifesteal SMP. Any commercial use, redistribution, or sale is strictly prohibited.

No Modification & Re-Upload: You may not modify, rename, repackage, or redistribute this texture pack in any form. Claiming it as your own work is strictly forbidden.

Attribution Required: If showcasing or using this texture pack publicly (videos, streams, posts), credit must be given to the original creator.
